hero.title: Why runners use RunGoMX
hero.description: RunGoMX helps runners compare races, register with confidence, and come back for official results.

story.title: One place for race details before and after race day
story.description: We focus on the public pages runners need most.
story.paragraph1: Use event pages to compare dates, prices, distances, and registration status before you commit.
story.paragraph2: After race day, come back for official results, rankings, and support when something needs review.
story.cardTitle: What visitors can do on RunGoMX

highlights.eventDiscovery: Browse races by date, location, and discipline.
highlights.registrationContext: Check pricing, registration status, and event details in one place.
highlights.officialResults: Look up official times, placings, and corrections after the race.
highlights.rankings: See rankings built from current official results.
highlights.helpAndTrust: Find help, contact options, privacy, and terms when you need them.

focus.title: Built to answer the questions runners ask most
focus.description: The public site should make the next step obvious.

discover.title: Compare events quickly
discover.description: Check dates, prices, locations, and registration status without jumping between pages.

follow.title: Check official outcomes
follow.description: Use results and rankings to confirm your time, placing, and latest standings.

support.title: Get help when something looks wrong
support.description: Find support, policies, and contact options without guessing where to start.

cta.title: Ready to start with a real race?
cta.description: Browse events to compare your options, or check results if you already raced.
